content.title: Where Engineering Meets Intelligence
content.description: By leveraging intelligent, agile, and innovative information technology solutions, we pave the way for the sustainable growth, transformation, and development of industries and businesses

1.title: Monitoring & Automation Systems Design
1.subTitle: Automation and monitoring systems enable continuous monitoring of processes and automated execution of tasks. These solutions increase the speed of work, reduce human errors, and help improve overall system performance.

2.title: Intelligent Website & Software Development
2.subTitle: We transform your ideas into powerful digital products by designing and developing custom website and intelligent software base on your business needs.

3.title: Network, System Design & Support
3.subTitle: A reliable infrastructure is the foundation of every successful business. We provide professional network and system support services to ensure the security, stability, and optimal performance of your infrastructure, so you can focus on growing your business with confidence.

4.title: Logo And Logo Motion
4.subTitle: Visual identity is the first connection between a brand and its audience. Through creative motion logo design, we transform your brand identity into a dynamic & memorable experience. By combining motion, design, and visual storytelling, we create a distinctive & impactful brand presence.

description.line1: Software design is not just about coding,
description.line2: we are with the project at all stages

OurCustomersSection.badge: Partnering with Leading Organizations and Businesses

structuredExecution.title: Requirements Discovery and Analysis
structuredExecution.description: Building on the technical expertise of our professional team across various industrial fields, we identify and analyze your business needs and goals to design and develop a smart, precise, and tailored solution that fits your real-world requirements.

contractDrivenScope.title: Understanding and Reviewing Needs
contractDrivenScope.description: Every project starts with a clear understanding of the problem. Before taking any action, we look into your business needs, goals, and challenges to create a solution that fits your real situation. This step ensures the project gets off on the right track from the very beginning.

continuousResponsibility.title: Sustainable Development and Support
continuousResponsibility.description: Our commitment does not end after project delivery. Through continuous support, performance optimization, and ongoing development, we stay by your side to ensure your product continues to grow over time and evolves alongside your business goals and changing needs.

TeamSection.title: Where Experience Shapes Expertise
TeamSection.description: Our team brings together expertise in software engineering, design, and AI to create scalable digital solutions.

hero.description1: From idea to deployment — we design and develop software solutions tailored to your business needs.
hero.description2: From IT infrastructure and software development to AI-powered solutions, we help businesses build, grow, and innovate.

web.title: Intelligent Software
web.description: We develop intelligent software solutions and AI-powered technologies to help industries optimize their processes, increase efficiency, and make smarter data-driven decisions.

mobile.title: Automation
mobile.description: We optimize your business processes with intelligent automation solutions, improving efficiency, accuracy, and operational speed.

ai.title: Network Setup & Support
ai.description: We design, install, and support secure network infrastructures to provide reliable connectivity and stable performance for your business.

consulting.title: Web & Mobile App Development
consulting.description: We build fast, scalable, and modern applications from scratch — tailored to your business logic and goals.

discovery.title: Discovery
discovery.description: We listen to your idea and understand your goals.

development.title: Development
development.description: Clean code, agile sprints and regular updates.

launch.title: Launch
launch.description: Deploy, test and support after delivery.

readyToBuild.title: Ready to Build Something?
readyToBuild.description: Tell us about your project and we'll get back to you within 24 hours.

HeroSection.description1: We transform technology into a competitive advantage. By combining engineering expertise, industrial knowledge, and advanced software development, we create intelligent solutions that transform the way organizations operate. Our software is more than just a tool—it is a driving force behind smarter decisions, higher productivity, and sustainable growth.
HeroSection.description2: We bridge the gap between industry and technology by delivering solutions that improve accuracy, reduce costs, minimize human error, and accelerate the digital transformation of businesses and industries.
HeroSection.description3: For us, innovation is more than developing software; it is about creating technologies that make industries smarter, faster, and more competitive.

StorySection.title: Where did we start?
StorySection.description: Ati Housh started with a simple idea: creating digital products that are truly designed for people. We believe technology should serve humans.

founded.title: Company founded
founded.description: Started with 3 people and a small office

BannerSection.title: Making reinvention real for our clients
BannerSection.description: Reinvention Services brings together the full breadth of Accenture, enabling us to solve your most complex problems and deliver reinvention at greater scale and impact.

onTimeDelivery.title: On-Time Project Delivery
onTimeDelivery.description: Through structured planning, transparent workflows, and effective project management, we deliver every project on schedule without compromising quality.

customerFocusedSolutions.title: Tailored to Real Business Needs
customerFocusedSolutions.description: Every business is unique. We carefully analyze your goals, challenges, and operational requirements to deliver solutions that are designed specifically for your organization.

crossDisciplinaryExpertise.title: Software Meets Industry Knowledge
crossDisciplinaryExpertise.description: Our team combines experienced software engineers with industry specialists, enabling us to build intelligent solutions that are both technically robust and practically aligned with your field.

continuousSupport.title: Continuous Support & Growth
continuousSupport.description: Our commitment goes beyond project delivery. We provide ongoing support, optimization, and continuous improvements to ensure your solution evolves alongside your business.

LeadershipSection.title: A Word from the CEO
LeadershipSection.paragraph1: At ATI Hoosh Bonyan, we believe the future of industry is driven by artificial intelligence, intelligent software, and engineering innovation. Our mission is to develop specialized solutions that enhance productivity, enable smarter decision-making, and turn digital transformation into a sustainable competitive advantage for industries.
LeadershipSection.paragraph2: We see technology not merely as a tool, but as a driving force for creating value, fostering growth, and strengthening competitiveness. Through expertise, innovation, and close collaboration, we are committed to delivering solutions that meet global standards and to being a trusted partner for organizations on their journey toward a smarter future.
LeadershipSection.paragraph3: Thank you for your trust. We look forward to partnering with you and supporting your digital transformation journey.
LeadershipSection.name: Nahid Shams

HeroSection.description: Have a question, a project in mind, or just want to get in touch? Send us a message and our team will get back to you as soon as possible.

SendMessageForm.title: Get in touch
SendMessageForm.description: Fill out the form below and we'll respond within one business day.
SendMessageForm.messagePlaceholder: Tell us about your project or question...
SendMessageForm.privacy: We respect your privacy. Your details are never shared with third parties.

ContactInfo.title: Reach us directly
ContactInfo.addressValue: Unit 4, Second Floor, Ghaem Building, No. 23, Tabatabaei Alley, Ashrafi Esfahani Street, after Hemmat Bridge, Tehran, Iran

HeroSection.description: Articles on artificial intelligence, software engineering, and cybersecurity — for teams that build, not just talk.

GetNewArticle.title: Have Questions About Our Articles?
GetNewArticle.description: Our team is ready to answer your questions and provide more insights about our articles.

step3.desc: Thank you for your information. We will contact you shortly to get started.

HeroSection.description: We're a team of designers and developers who use AI to build better digital experiences. Send us your resume — we'd love to know what you're great at.

ApplyForm.title: Tell us about yourself
ApplyForm.description: Fill in your details and attach your resume. We typically respond within a few days.
ApplyForm.privacy: Your information is reviewed only by our HR team and is never shared with sales or third parties.
ApplyForm.success: Your resume has been submitted successfully.
